how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Deputy Project Manager Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Deputy Project Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Kanpur Deputy Project Manager posts is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Deputy Project Manager post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the Deputy Project Manager position at IIT Kanpur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply for this recruitment by sending their application via email.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Deputy Project Manager role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Deputy Project Manager post will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 23,000 to Rs. 59,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Deputy Project Manager post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a CA/ICWA/CS, a Post Graduate degree with 5 years of relevant experience, or a Graduate degree with 8 years of relevant experience at an appropriate level.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Deputy Project Manager position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Deputy Project Manager role will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Kanpur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur is located in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 208016.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Deputy Project Manager post at IIT Kanpur is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
